english: You will be receiving short messages 3 times a week for six months. Those messages will help healthcare workers like us make progress in the quality of our work and learn how to cope with extreme fatigue and stress.
kinyarwanda: Muzajya mwakira ubutumwa bugufi (messages) inshuro 3 mu cyumweru, mu gihe cy'amezi atandatu. Ubwo butumwa buzafasha abakozi batanga serivisi z'ubuvuzi nkatwe, gutera intambwe nziza mu kumenya uko dukora akazi kacu neza, no guhangana n'umunaniro ukabije.

english: The aim of these messages is to help you as a healthcare worker feel better and more confident in your work and your daily life.
kinyarwanda: Intego y'ubu butumwa ni ukugufasha nk'umukozi utanga serivisi z'ubuvuzi kumva umeze neza kandi wifitemo icyizere n'umutekano mu kazi ukora ndetse n'ubuzima bwawe bwa buri munsi.

english: There are several things we face at work such as being given too many responsibilities and working overtime. However, we can at least learn how to deal with extreme fatigue and stress.
kinyarwanda: Hari ibintu byinshi duhura nabyo mu kazi nko guhabwa inshingano nyinshi, gukora amasaha y'ikirenga,... Ariko byibuze dushobora kwiga uko twarwanya umunaniro ukabije.

english: After this six-month journey, we hope that you will be able to:
kinyarwanda: Nyuma y'uru rugendo rw'amezi atandatu, twizera ko uzaba ushobora:

english: Know what to do when you are under extreme fatigue or stress
kinyarwanda: Kumenya uko witwara mu gihe ufite umunaniro ukabije (stress)

english: Recover after going through difficult times
kinyarwanda: Kongera kumererwa neza nyuma yo kunyura mu bihe bigoye

english: Find time and learns ways to relax
kinyarwanda: Kubona akanya ko kuruhuka no kumenya uburyo bwo kuruhuka

english: Know how to get along well with those we live with and work with
kinyarwanda: Kumenya kubanira neza abo tubana ndeste nabo dukorana

english: Prepare a special notebook that you will use for this program. Every message you will receive will help you think and act on a certain thing.
kinyarwanda: Tegura ikaye yihariye uzifashisha muri iyi gahunda. Buri butumwa bugufi uzajya wakira buzajya bugufasha gutekereza no gukora ku kintu runaka.

english: Read the messages in a timely manner and without distraction, think about them and act on them. Every prompt you will help you develop good habits.
kinyarwanda: Soma ubutumwa bugufi mu gihe nyacyo/kitakubangamiye, butekerezeho hanyuma ubushyire mu bikorwa (ufate ingamba). Buri gikorwa cyose uzagerageza gukora kizagufasha kugira ingeso nziza.

english: Keep notes in your notebook about your thoughts and actions.
kinyarwanda: Reka twandike mu makayi yacu ibyo twatekereje n'ibyo twakoze.

english: The more effort you put into this program, the more benefits you will get, you will learn how to take care of yourself, and how to be better at your job, as the days go by.
kinyarwanda: Uko ushyira imbaraga muri iyi gahunda, uzungukiramo ibyiza byinshi, uzarushaho kumenya uko wakwiyitaho, n'uko wakora akazi kawe neza, uko iminsi izagenda ihita.

english: In order for this program to benefit you, we encourage you to:
kinyarwanda: Kugira ngo iyi gahunda izakugirire akamaro, turagukangurira:

english: Read all the messages you receive
Assess what helped you and what did not
Share what you have learned with others who are in this program.
kinyarwanda: Sangiza  ibyo wize abo muri kumwe muri iyi gahunda.

english: Every month, you will have time for self reflection, see what you have done and how it is helping you. It will be time to look through your notebook and think about what worked and what did not.
kinyarwanda: Buri kwezi, uzajya wisuzuma, urebe ibyo wakoze n'uko biri kugenda bigufasha. Azaba ari igihe cyo kureba mu ikaye yawe ugatekereza ku byagufashije n'ibitaragufashije.

english: Some of these messages will be useful to you, and there are others which you might not find helpful. Keep writing in your notebook even though you do not fully understand the message. You might use it again depending on the situation or where you are.
kinyarwanda: Ubu butumwa hari ubuzakugirira akamaro, hari n'ubundi uzumva ntacyo bugufashije. Komeza wandike mu ikayi yawe n'ubwo waba udasobanukiwe neza n'ubutumwa. Ushobora kongera kubwifashisha bitewe n'ibihe urimo cyangwa aho uri.

english: It is good to be in this six-month program because it will help you feel better, get stronger, and give you knowledge/skills that helps you deal with life  and professional problems. This is a personal journey. You are the one to choose when to allocate time for this program.
kinyarwanda: Ni byiza kuba muri iyi gahunda y’amezi atandatu kuko izagufasha kurushaho kumererwa neza, ugakomera, no kuguha ubumenyi bugufasha guhangana n'ibibazo by'ubuzima muri rusange no mu kazi k’ubuvuzi. Uru ni urugendo rw'umuntu ku giti cye. Ni wowe uzihitiramo umwanya uzagenera iyi gahunda.

english: Remember that the more effort you put into this program, the more successful you will be.
kinyarwanda: Zirikana ko uko ushyira imbaraga muri iyi gahunda ari nako urushaho kugubwa neza.

english: We know the effort you put into your work and how exhausting it is. That is why these short messages that you receive will help you take care of yourself.
kinyarwanda: Tuzi imbaraga mushyira mu kazi kanyu ndetse n'uburyo kavunanye. Ni kubw' iyo mpamvu ubutumwa bugufi muzajya mwohererezwa buzajya bubafasha kwiyitaho.

english: You will be sent messages that will help you cope with extreme fatigue and stress.
kinyarwanda: Muzajya mwohererezwa ubutumwa buzabafasha guhangana n'imvune z'akazi kenshi.

english: Remember: It is not the load that breaks you down. It’s the way you carry it.
kinyarwanda: Intore ntiganya yishakira ibisubizo. Kwihangana bitera kunesha.

english: Think about what you are good at. Make a list of the things you do well, then ask yourself why they are important to you and why they matter.
kinyarwanda: Tekereza kuby'uzi gukora neza. Kora urutonde rw'ibintu ukora neza, ubundi wibaze impamvu ari ingirakamaro kuri wowe.

english: Remember: You don’t have to be great to start, but you do have to start to be great. So, let’s start!

It may feel like you are not doing well at your job, sometimes you work overtime. Think about how important your work is and how you help your clients. Before you go to bed at night, try to make a list of the good things you did today.
kinyarwanda: Birashoboka ko wumva udakora neza akazi kawe, rimwe na rimwe ugakora n’amasaha y’ikirenga. Tekereza ukuntu akazi kawe ari ingezi n'uburyo ufasha abakugana. Mbere yo kuryama nijoro, gerageza gukora urutonde rw'ibintu byiza wakoze uyu umunsi.

english: Your work is important and your clients appreciates the work you do.
kinyarwanda: Akazi kawe ni ingenzi kandi abakugana bishimira ibikorwa ukora.
Gukora neza, Gushimwa na buri wese bisaba umbwitange n'umwanya uhagije.

english: In our daily life, we encounter challenges that make us forget what is important to us. Try to find time to think about what matters; is it your family, people you care about, your work/profession, or is it your well-being. Those are your strengths. Think whether you live a life that serve your values.
kinyarwanda: Mu buzima bwa buri munsi duhura n'ibitunaniza bituma twibagirwa icy'ingenzi kuri twe. Gerageza gufata umwanya utekereze kubigufitiye umumaro; ese n'umuryango wawe, n'abantu witaho, n'umwuga wawe, cyangwa n'ubuzima bwiza? Izo nizo mbaraga zawe. Tekereza niba ubaho ubuzima buguhesha agaciro.

english: Remember: If it matters to you, you will find a way to do it.

Are there any changes you would like to make in your life? Set a goal of what you want to achieve each week. It does not have to be related to your work. Writing down your goal in a notebook will increase the chance of achieving it. Achieving a short goal will help you feel that you are the master of your life.
kinyarwanda: Ese hari impinduka wifuza ku buzima bwawe? Buri cyumweru ihe intego y'icyo ushaka kugeraho. Singombwa kuba gifitanye isano n'akazi ukora. Andika iyo ntego mu ikayi ibi bizakongerera amahirwe yo kuyigeraho. Kugera ku ntego nto bizagufasha kumva ko uri umuyobozi w'ubuzima bwawe.

english: Remember: A goal without a plan is just a wish.
kinyarwanda: Fata umwanya wo kongera kureba mu ikayi y’imihigo.

english: Setting yourself small achievable goals every week will help you stay focused and motivated. As you work on achieving your weekly goals, make sure to congratulate yourself for doing so. You have made progress in your path to achieving your purpose. You know you can do it!
kinyarwanda: Kugira intego nto zaburi cyumweru bigufasha gukomeza kwibanda kubyo ukora no kugira ishyaka. Uko ukora ugerageza kugera ku ntego zawe za buri cyumweru, ninako wakagombye kubyishimira. Wateye intambwe mu nzira mu kuba wagera ku ntego yawe. Urabizi ko ushobora kuyigeraho!

english: Remember: Every day may not be good, but there will be something good in every day.
kinyarwanda: Imihigo irakomeye kandi irakomeje/irashoboka. Kandi Buhoro buhoro nirwo rugendo.

english: Think about what you value most in life. Is it being a good parent? Is it helping your community? Is it your career? Plan activities that help you do what is most important to you. If you want to be a good parent, make sure you spend an hour playing with your child every day.
kinyarwanda: Tekereza kubyo uha agaciro cyane mu buzima. Ese ni ukuba umubyeyi mwiza? Ese ni ugufasha abaturage? Ese ni umwuga wawe? Tegura ibikorwa bigufasha gukora ibifite akamaro. Niba ushaka kuba umubyeyi mwiza, mara nibura isaha ukina n'umwana wawe buri munsi.

english: Remember: Live a life of purpose.

When something unexpected happens, you may have thoughts like ‘I’m bad’ or ‘It’s all my fault.’ Thinking negative thoughts about yourself can affect your mood, your work, and your relationships. You can practice thinking more positive thoughts. Instead of ‘It’s my fault’, try thinking ‘I made a mistake, but I have learned a lesson.’ You are in charge of your thoughts.
kinyarwanda: Iyo ikintu gitunguranye kibaye, ushobora kugira ibitekerezo uti: \"Ndi mubi\", ni \"amakosa yanjye\". Kugira ibitekerezo bitari byiza kuri wowe bishobora kugira ingaruka ku myumvire yawe, ku kazi kawe, n'umubano wawe n'abandi. Ushobora kwitoza kugira ibitekerezo byiza. Aho kugira ngo uvuge \"Ni amakosa yanjye\", gerageza utekereze uti \"Nakoze ikosa, ariko nakuyemo isomo\". Ni wowe uyobora ibitekerezo byawe.

english: When you learn, you grow as a person and as a health worker. You can learn from the people around you. Think of a health worker you admire. This could be a co-worker or your supervisor. Make a list of the things they do well that you would like to be better at. Choose one thing from the list to try. Later you can try other things.
kinyarwanda: Iyo wize, ubumenyi bwawe buriyongera nk'umukozi utanga serevisi z'ubuvuzi. Ushobora kwigira ku bantu bakuba hafi. Tekereza ku mukozi utanga serevisi z'ubuvuzi w'icyitegererezo kuri wowe. Uyu ashobora kuba umukozi mukorana cyangwa umuyobozi wawe. Kora urutonde rw'ibintu bakora neza wifuza nawe gukora. Hitamo kimwe muri urwo rutonde uri bugerageze. Ushobora kuba wagerageza ibindi nyuma.

english: Sometimes we judge ourselves more harshly than we do others. “‘I did that wrong, I was late, I forgot something’.” Think about what advice you would give to a friend. Then be your own best friend and use that advice yourself.
kinyarwanda: Rimwe na rimwe twicira urubanza cyane kurusha uko turucira abandi uti \"nabikoze nabi, nari natinze, nari nabyibagiwe.\" Tekereze ku nama waha incuti yawe, noneho ba incuti yawe ubwawe wigire iyo nama.

english: Remember: Make your co-workers your work family.

Being part of a team can make you feel supported. It helps to have regular meetings, shared goals, and to work together to achieve them. Being part of a team means you can learn from each other. Suggest a regular team meeting to share thoughts and skills.
kinyarwanda: Kuba umwe mu bagize itsinda bituma wumva ushyigikiwe. Bibafasha guhura, mugasangira intego zanyu, mugakorera hamwe kugira ngo muzigereho, ikindi nuko ushobora kwigira kuri mugenzi wawe. Tanga igitekerezo cyo kugira inama zihoraho zo kungurana ibitekerezo rusange by'itsinda kugira ngo musangire ubumenyi n'ubuhanga bwanyu.

english: Remember: It takes a whole band to play a good tune.

Learning something new, even if it’s not work-related, can help you feel you are growing. It can make you feel good about yourself and more hopeful. Are courses offered by your employer? If not, find a person whose skills and abilities you admire and make time to watch them and learn from them.
kinyarwanda: Kwiga ikintu gishya, nubwo cyaba kitajyanye n'akazi ukora gishobora kugufasha kwaguka mubitekerezo. Bikanatuma wumva uguwe neza kandi wifitiye icyizere. Ese haba hari amasomo atangwa n'umukoresha wawe? Niba ari hoya, shaka umuntu ufite ubuhanga n'ubushobozi ushake umwanya wo kureba ibyo akora unamwigireho.

english: Remember: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.

You and your co-workers have your own unique skills that you bring to your job. Why don’t you form a support group and take turns to share skills? You could meet face-to-face or form a WhatsApp group. You can learn so much from the experience, knowledge, and skills of each other.
kinyarwanda: Wowe n'abakozi mukorana mufite ubuhanga bwihariye butuma muza mu kazi. Kuki mutakora itsinda muzajya musangiramo ubwo ubuhanga? Mushobora guhura imbonankubone cyangwa se mugahurira ku mbugankoranyambaga (whatsApp group). Ushobora kwiga byinshi k'ufite uburambe, ubumenyi, n' ubuhanga.

english: Remember: In learning you will teach and in teaching you will learn.

You can be a role model to your co-workers. Share with your friends and co-workers what helps you relax and manage your stress. You can help them find coping strategies that work for them. Happier teams can lead to better results. You can lead this change.
kinyarwanda: Ushobora kuba intangarugero mu bakozi mukorana. Sangiza inshuti zawe nabo mukorana ikigufasha kuruhuka no kurwanya umunaniro ukabije. Ushobora kubafasha kubona uburyo bwabafasha. Ikipe yishimye iratsinda. Ushobora kuba umusemburo w’impinduka.

english: Remember: Be the change you want to see.

Learning to accept that some things are out of your control will help you cope when you feel sad or angry. Accept that the some of the stress you may be feeling is perhaps not your fault. And forgive yourself if you have made mistakes - we all do sometimes.
kinyarwanda: Kwiga kwakira ko ibintu bimwe na bimwe birenze ubushobozi bwawe, bizagufasha kumeya uko witwara igihe uzaba ubabaye cyangwa urakaye. Akira ko atari amakosa yawe kuba wumva ufite umunaniro ukabije.  Kandi ibabarire niba wakoze amakosa. Twese turakosa rimwe na rimwe.

english: Remember: Just when the caterpillar thought the world was ending, he turned into a butterfly.

Feeling unfulfilled? Make a list of your core values. Now try to do things that match. Want to help your community? Join a local project. Are children your focus? Put time aside to play with them. Want to develop your skills at work? Volunteer for a new role or to mentor someone.
kinyarwanda: Urumva hari ibyo utarageraho mu buzima? Kora urutonde rw'indangagaciro zawe. Noneho gerageza gukora ibintu bihuye n’izo ndagagaciro zawe. Urashaka gufasha abo muturanye? Itabire ibikorwa rusange. Ese ukunda abana? Shakisha umwanya ukine nabo. Urashaka kongera ubwenge/ubumenyi bwawe mu kazi? Shaka amahugurwa y’igihe gito cyangwa wiyandikishe muri kaminuza.

english: Remember: If you cannot see where you are going, ask someone who has been there before.
kinyarwanda: Note: Gusobanura indanga gaciro z’umuntu ku giti cye.

english: Is there a health worker you admire and would like to learn from? Spend some time with this person. Talk about your work, your aspirations, and the daily pressures you face. This person can help you find solutions and can make suggestions to help you grow into the health worker you’d like to be.
kinyarwanda: Ese haba hari umukozi utanga serevisi z'ubuvuzi wishimira wumva wakwigiraho? Marana umwanya n’uyu muntu. Muganire ibyerekeye akazi kawe, ibyifuzo byawe, n'imbogamizi uhura nazo. Uyu muntu ashobora kugufasha kubona ibisubizo hamwe n'ibitekerezo byagufasha kwaguka nk'umukozi utanga serevisi z'ubuvuzi wifuza kuba we.

english: Remember: A mentor can show you the way.

You can learn a lot from your co-workers. Create a support group so you can meet regularly. Share how your week has gone, what the challenges were, and how you dealt with them. You can learn from each other. This will also help to make your relationships stronger.
kinyarwanda: Ushobora kwigira byinshi ku bakozi mukorana. Shishikariza abandi kujya mu itsinda ryunganirana mujye muhura buri gihe. Sangiza abandi uko icyumweru cyawe cyagenze, imbogamizi wahuye nazo, nukuntu wazitwayemo. Mushobora kwigira kuri bagenzi banyu. Ibi nabyo bizatuma ubucuti bwanyu bukomera.

english: Remember: Lonely people build walls when what they need are bridges.
By now you will have found your favorite ways to help you manage your feelings of stress. Share with your co-workers what helps you. Encourage them to find their own coping strategies.
kinyarwanda: Kugeza ubu, wabashije kubona uburyo ukunda bugufasha kurwanya umunaniro ukabije. Sangiza abo mukorana ibyagufashije. Bashishikarize gushaka uburyo bwabafasha.

english: Remember: Perfection is boring. Getting better is where all the fun is!

Learning something new can be very rewarding, even when it is not work-related. Is there something you have always wanted to learn? Knitting? Painting? Singing? These activities can help you relax. You will also be able to do your work better.
kinyarwanda: Kwiga ikintu gishya nubwo byaba bitajyanye n'umwuga wawe wungukiramo ibyiza byinshi. Ese haba hari ikintu wahoraga wumva wakwiga? Urugero: Kuboha, gusiga irangi, kuririmba,... Ibi bikorwa byagufasha kuruhuka no gukora neza akazi.

english: Remember: Learning turns mirrors into windows.

If you have work stresses, your co-workers will have them too. Why don’t you meet with your co-workers regularly to share and discuss what troubles you and what helps you cope? You can learn a lot from each other and support each other too.
kinyarwanda: Niba ufite ibibazo by'umunaniro ukabije utewe n'akazi, abo mukorana nabo barawufite. Kubera iki utahura n'abo mukorana ku buryo bwihariye ngo muganire ku bibabangamira n'ibibafasha kubivamo? Ushobora kwigira byinshi kuri mugenzi wawe kandi mugafashanya.

english: Remember: Be somebody who makes everyone feel like a somebody.
kinyarwanda: Abishyize hamwe ntakibananira.\nUmutwe umwe wifasha gusara ntiwifasha gutekereza.

english: You can learn a lot from people around you. Be curious. Watch and learn how people around you behave and the effect their behavior has. Try to put into practice something you have observed others doing well. It could be anyone - your colleague, supervisor, friend, or family member. \nBe patient with yourself. You may need to practice in order to do it well.
kinyarwanda: Ushobora kwigira byinshi ku bantu bakuba hafi. Gira amatsiko. Reba kandi wige uburyo ki abantu bakuba hafi bitwara n'ingaruka z'imyitwarire yabo. Gerageza gushyira mu bikorwa ibintu byiza wabonye abandi bakora. Ashobora kuba uwo ariwe wese; abo mukorana, umuyobozi wawe, inshuti cyangwa umwe mu bagize umuryango wawe. Gerageza kubyitoza kugira ngo ubikore neza.
Nta mugabo umwe. \nInkingi imwe ntigera inzu.

english: You may now be aware of the aspects of your work and home that make you stressed and upset. People around you may have similar worries and stressors. Be a good listener. Just knowing that they have a friend to talk to and that they are not alone in their troubles can help a lot.
kinyarwanda: Uzi ibintu byerekeye akazi kawe n'urugo rwawe bituma ugira umunaniro ukabije cyangwa urakara.  Abo mubana mu buzima bwa buri munsi bahura n' impungenge ndetse n' ibibazo nkibyo. Batege amatwi. Kumenya ko bafite inshuti kandi  batari bonyine mu bibazo birabafasha cyane.

english: Remember: Friendship is the cement that holds the world together.
Every patient you have ever treated is thankful for your skills. You make their lives better and they will remember you.
kinyarwanda: Buri murwayi wavuye yishimira ubuhanga bwawe. Ubuzima bwabo ubuhindura neza kandi bazahora babikwibukira.

english: Remember: The past is your lesson, the present is your gift, the future is your motivation.
This session will assist you in navigating through Resilience Messages.
kinyarwanda: Iki gice kiragufasha/ kirakuyobora kumenya uko ukoresha iyi porogaramu.

english: After entering the Well Being module and entering the resilience message section you will need to complete the survey, and the healthcare worker will begin receiving resilience messages. On the main page, resilience messages are put into the following categories.
kinyarwanda: Nyuma yo kwinjira muri module  ya \" Gubwa neza\" winjiye no muri gahunda y’ \"Ubutumwa bwo Kwifasha kwiyitaho\", nuko usubiza  ibibazo byo kwisuzuma. , Nk’umukozi utanga servisi z’ubuvuzi watangira kubona ubutumwa bugufasha kwiyitaho. Ku ipaje ibanza, urahasanga ubutumwa bwo kwifasha kwiyitaho bugiye buri mubyiciro bikurikira

english: Unread: these messages have not yet been read by the healthcare worker.
kinyarwanda: Ubutumwa utarasoma: Ubu ni ubutumwa umukozi utanga serevisi z’ubuvuzi atarasoma.

english: Favourites: these are messages that are saved by the healthcare worker by marking them as \"favourite\"
kinyarwanda: Ubutumwa wishimiye: Ubu ni ubutumwa bubikwa muri iki gice mugihe umukozi utanga serevisi z’ubuvuzi yabwishimiye/yabukunze.

english: Message types: After reading, messages are grouped into the following categories for easy reference: Growth, Connecting, Stress Management, Self-care, Mindfulness.
kinyarwanda: Ibyiciro by’ubutumwa: Nyuma yo gusoma, ubutumwa bujya muri ibi byiciro bikurikira. Terimbere, Gusabana, Kwiyitaho, Kunanirwa, na Mindfulness.

english: Click on \"Unread\" to locate all unread messages.
kinyarwanda: Kanda ahanditse \"Ubutumwa utarasoma\" Shakira ubutumwa utarasoma muri icyo gice.

english: Click twice on the message to fully open it.
kinyarwanda: Kanda inshuro ebyili ku butumwa uri gusoma kugirango ubusome neza.

english: After opening, the message will be removed from unread messages.
kinyarwanda: Nyuma yo kubusoma, ubutumwa buhita buva ku rutonde rw'ubutumwa utarasoma.

english: If you find a message particularly relevant, you can add it to your favourites for future reference:
kinyarwanda: Niba hari ubutumwa wasomye ukabwishimira/ukabukunda, ushobora kubushyira muri iki gice. Uko bikorwa:

english: After reading the message, Click on the three buttons above the message
kinyarwanda: Umaze gusoma ubutumwa, Kanda ku tudomo dutatu turi hejuru y’ubutumwa

english: Choose \"Favourite\" to mark the message, and it will
kinyarwanda: Hitamo \"Ishimire Ubutumwa\" (burahita bujya mu gice cy’ubutumwa wishimiye).

english: If you don’t have time to read a message fully after opening it, you can schedule a reminder to read it again
kinyarwanda: Niba ubuze umwanya wo gusoma ubutumwa, ushobora kubuhitamo ukaba wabusoma igihe uboneye umwanya

english: Click on the three buttons above a message.
kinyarwanda: Kanda ku tudomo dutatu turi hejuru y’ubutumwa.

english: Click on \"Remind me\" for messages you cannot read immediately.
kinyarwanda: Kanda kuri \"Unyibutse\" ku ubutumwa utagiye gusoma ako kanya.

english: Set a reminder to revisit the message in: One hour, Six hours, Twelve hours
kinyarwanda: Hitamo igihe uraba waboneye umwanya wo gusoma ubutumwa. Urahabwa amahitamo yo kuba wabusoma; mu gihe cy’isaha imwe, amasaha atandatu cyangwa amasaha cumi n'abiri.

english: Think of a time when you felt bad: angry, sad... Maybe you were tired, restless, had a headache, or felt short of breath. These are all signs of extreme fatigue or stress.
kinyarwanda: Tekereza igihe wumvaga utameze neza: warakaye, ubabaye,... Birashoboka ko wari unaniwe,  utisanzuye, urwaye umutwe, cyangwa wumva udahumeka neza; ibyo byose ni ibimeyetso by'umunaniro ukabije (stress).

english: What did you do to feel better again? Did you know that you can help yourself? Follow the tips in the messages, you may find some that will help you.
kinyarwanda: Ese ni iki wakoze kugira ngo wumve wongeye kumererwa neza? Wari uziko ushobora kwifasha burya!Kurikiza inama mu butumwa wohererezwa, ushobora gusangamo zimwe zagufasha.

english: Remember: Sometimes you win, sometimes you learn.

Research has shown that 86% of nurses experience extreme fatigue or stress which means that other workers can experience it too. This does not mean that being stressed or tired is always a bad thing. It can help you solve problems and achieve your goals.
kinyarwanda: Ubushakashatsi bwagaragaje ko 86% by'abaforomo bahura n'umunaniro; bivuze ko n'abandi bakozi bishobora kubabaho. Ibi ntibisobanuye ko kuba wagira umunaniro ari bibi buri gihe. Bishobora kuba byagufasha gukemura ibibazo no kugera ku ntego zawe.

english: When you are tired, you feel overwhelmed, and you do not get how to control it. During that time, you will feel scared, overloaded, unhappy, and weak.
kinyarwanda: Iyo umunaniro ubaye mwishi wumva bikurenze, ukabura n'uburyo bwo kuwugenzura. Muri icyo gihe, uzumva ufite ubwoba, akazi kakurenze, utishimye,ufite n'intege nke.

english: Here are some simple ways to help you:
kinyarwanda: Ubu ni bumwe mu buryo bworoshye bwagufasha:

english: Remember: No act of kindness is ever wasted.
Talk to a trusted friend, a family member, or a co-worker
kinyarwanda: Kuganira n’inshuti yawe wizeye, umwe mu bagize umuryango wawe, cyangwa mugenzi wawe mukorana

english: Spend your time doing something you love.
kinyarwanda: Gukoresha umwanya wawe ukora ikintu ukunda.

english: Make a list of things that worries you. Now think about how those things make you feel. Are you feeling angry, frustrated, or stressed? Or it's all three! Do not hesitate to give names to your feelings because it helps you manage them better.
kinyarwanda: Kora urutonde rw'ibintu bigutera impungenge. Noneho tekereza uburyo ibyo bintu bigutera kumva umerewe. Ese wumva urakaye, wacitse intege, cyangwa uhangayitse? Cyangwa ni byose uko ari bitatu! Ntutinde guha izina ibyiyumviro byawe kuko bigufasha kubicunga neza.

english: Remember: One small positive thought in the morning can change your whole day.
Your work and family life can be challenging, and can make you feel depressed and incapable. If you make a small change in your life, you prepare yourself for difficult times.
kinyarwanda: Akazi kawe n'ubuzima bw'umuryango wawe bishobora kuba ingorabahizi, bikagutera kumva uhangayitse kandi utanashoboye. Mu gihe ukoze impinduka nto mu buzima bwawe, ushobora kwitegura no guhangana n'ibihe bigoranye.

english: These short messages give you advice and strategies for dealing with extreme fatigue and stress. So, choose what you can do and plan to do it in your life.
kinyarwanda: Ubu butumwa buguha inama n'ingamba zo guhangana n'umunaniro ukabije. Rero hitamo ibyo wumva ushobora gukora hanyuma utegure kubikora mu buzima bwawe.

english: Remember: Real change happens one step at a time.
To relax is important for building ourselves up. Find something you like to do after work that will help you relax: for example reading books, listening to the radio, physical exercising, dancing,…
kinyarwanda: Kuruhuka ni ngombwa kugirango wiyubake. Shakisha ikintu ukunda gukora nyuma y’akazi cyagufasha kuruhuka neza: urugero gusoma ibitabo, kumva radio, gukora imyitozo ngororamubiri, kubyina,...

english: This will help you relax and do your work better the next day. Make it a habit to take care of yourself every day.
kinyarwanda: Ibi bizagufasha kuruhuka no gukora akazi kawe neza umunsi ukurikira. Bigire akamenyero ko kwiyitaho buri munsi.

english: Remember: Make time to rest and be thankful.

Making small changes in your daily life can help you cope with extreme fatigue and stress. Do a breathing exercise, talk to your friends, or drink water every once in a while. These small changes will help you feel better.
kinyarwanda: Kugira impinduka nto mubuzima bwawe bwa buri munsi bishobora kugufasha kurwanya umunaniro ukabije. Gukora umwitozo wo guhumeka, kuganira n' inshuti zawe, cyangwa gusoma ku mazi buri kanya. Izi mpinduka nto zizagufasha kumererwa neza.

english: Remember: If you see someone without a smile, give them one of yours.
Sometimes life can be challenging and it is easy to be discouraged. But you have strengths to face those challenges:
kinyarwanda: Rimwe na rimwe, ubuzima bushobora kuba ingorabahizi kandi biroroshye kuba wacika intege. Ariko ufite imbaraga zo guhangana nizo ngorane:

english: Remember: When you help yourself, you help everyone around you.
kinyarwanda: Buhoro buhoro nibwo buryo bw' umugenzi.

english: Find out what is causing your extreme fatigue and stress.
Change what you can change. Small changes will help you learn how to behave.
kinyarwanda: Hindura ibyo ushobora guhindura. Impinduka nto zizagufasha kumenya uko witwara.

english: Accept what you cannot change. There are things that are beyond your control.
kinyarwanda: Emera ibyo udashobora guhindura. Hari ibintu bimwe biba birenze ubushobozi bwawe.

english: There are things you can do during your working day that can help you manage the challenges of work. Here are a few tips. Choose any that work for you:
kinyarwanda: Hari ibintu ushobora gukora mu gihe uri mukazi bikaba byagufasha gukemura imbogamizi z'akazi uhura nazo. Izi ni zimwe mu nama zagufasha. Hitamo iyariyo yose yagufasha:

english: Remember: Be more blessed and less stressed.
Take a sip of water at regular intervals.
kinyarwanda: Gufata ikirahuri cy'amazi mu gihe bibaye ngombwa.

english: Stand up, do a stretch, and take 5 deep breaths.
kinyarwanda: Guhaguruka, kugorora ingingo, no gukora umwitozo wo guhumeka ukabikora inshuro eshanu.

english: Start to have a friendly chat with a co-worker.

At the end of your day think about the things you are grateful for. The good weather, the help someone gave you, the clean water you drank, the chance you had to rest with your family. Add them up. You may find there are more things to be grateful for than you realized.
kinyarwanda: Igihe umunsi wawe uri kurangira, tekereza kubintu wishimiye cyangwa byagushimishije. Ese ni ikirere cyiza, n'ubufasha wahawe n'umuntu, n'amazi asukuye wanyoye, n'amahirwe wagize yo kuruhukana n'umuryango wawe se? Bitekerezeho. Ushobora gusanga hari ibintu byinshi byo kwishimira kuruta uko wabitekerezaga.

english: Remember: When it rains, look for rainbows. When it’s dark, look for stars.

Have you found a way to add little breaks into your everyday life? Experts say that even a 30-60 second break every 20 minutes of work can help to give you more energy. It could be a stretch, a minute of deep breathing, taking a sip of water, or a mindful handwashing exercise. Whatever you prefer, try to build short breaks into your working day.
kinyarwanda: Ese wabashije kubona uburyo bwo gufata ibiruhuko bigufi mu buzima bwawe bwa buri munsi? Inzobere zivugako ko kuruhuka amasegonda 30-60 buri minota 20 y'akazi bishobora kukongerera imbaraga. Bishobora kuba ari ukunanura ingingo, umunota wo gukora umwitozo wo guhumeka, kunywa ikirahuri cy'amazi, cyangwa umwitozo wo gukaraba intoki. Icyo aricyo cyose, gerageza gushaka ibiruhuko bigufi mu gihe cy'akazi.

english: Do you have a Mind Bully? An inner voice that whispers, ‘I can’t’, ‘I am no good’, ‘I failed’? Answer back! ‘Yes, I failed the test, but it was hard, and I can try again’. Or ‘Yes, I was late, but I was helping someone who needed me’. Try to find a more balanced way of thinking.
kinyarwanda: Ese ujya ugira ibitekerezo bigutoteza? Ijwi rikongorera, \"Ntabwo nabikora\", \"Ntabwo nshoboye\", \"naratsinzwe\"? Risubize \"Yego natsinzwe isuzuma, ariko byari bikomeye, kandi nzabigerageza na none\". Cyangwa se \"Yego, nari nakerewe ariko nari ndimo ndafasha umuntu wari ukeneye ubufasha\".

english: Remember: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
kinyarwanda: Gerageza ushake uburyo bwiza bwo gutekereza.

english: Do patients listen to you? Do they get angry with you? It can be scary if people shout. Try these 3 things:
kinyarwanda: Ese abarwayi bumva ibyo ubabwiye? Ese bajya bakurakarira? Bishobora gutera ubwoba iyo abantu basakuza. Gerageza ibi bintu bitatu:

english: Remember: Be kind to angry people. They need it most!
Listen. Sometimes they just need to be listened to.
kinyarwanda: Tega amatwi. Rimwe na rimwe baba bakeneye kumvwa.

english: Stay calm. That usually helps to calm others down.
kinyarwanda: Tuza. Ibyo ubwabyo bifasha abandi gutuza.

english: Remind them that you are trained to care for them. Say something like, ‘I am going to try to fix this for you’.
kinyarwanda: Bibutse ko uri umukozi wahuguriwe kubitaho. Babwire ikintu nk’urugero: \"ngiye kugerageza kubafasha ibi\".

english: Have you found a way of coping with work stress? Maybe it’s taking regular short breaks or spending time with friends. If something works for you, make a plan to do it every day so it becomes a good habit.
kinyarwanda: Ese waba warabonye uburyo bwo guhangana n'imihangayiko n'umunaniro ukabije uterwa n'akazi kenshi? Birashoboka ko ari ugufata ibiruhuko bito cyangwa guharira umwanya inshuti zawe zo mu kazi. Niba hari ikigukundira, shaka umwanya wo kubikora buri munsi kugeza bibaye akamenyero.

english: Remember: Success is liking yourself, liking what you do, and liking how you do it.

If you feel depressed or anxious about work, you don’t have to cope on your own. Find out if there are mental health support services in your workplace or community. It is OK to ask for help. Just as your body needs the help of a doctor to stay healthy, your mind can stay healthy with the right help.
kinyarwanda: Niba wumva wihebye cyangwa uhangayikishijwe n'akazi, ntabwo wakwifasha wenyine. Menya niba aho ukorera cyangwa aho utuye hari ahantu hatangwa serevisi zita ku buzima bwo mu mutwe. Ni byiza gusaba ubufasha. Nkuko umubiri wawe ukenera ubufasha bwa muganga kugira ngo umererwe neza, ni nako ubuzima bwo mu mutwe bukenera ubufasha kugira ngo nabwo bumererwe neza.

english: Remember: When the well is dry, we know the worth of water.

Feeling angry and upset? Sometimes we behave in ways we cannot control. Understanding what makes us angry can help us control our emotions. Spend some time thinking about what makes you upset and how you deal with it. This will help you have healthier relationships with people around you.
kinyarwanda: Ese urumva urakaye kandi ubabaye? Rimwe na rimwe, twitwara mu buryo tudashobora kugenzura. Kumva ikidutera kurakara bishobora gutuma tugenzura amarangamutima yacu. Mara umwanya utekereza kubigutera kumva ubabaye n'uburyo ubyitwaramo. Ibi bizagufasha Kubana neza n'abantu bakuba hafi.

english: Remember: Anger makes you smaller, acceptance makes you grow.
Try to keep a diary where you can write down things that make you happy/smile and things that make you sad/stressed. This will help you focus on your feelings and think about how your week went.
kinyarwanda: Komeza ukoreshe ikayi wandikamo ibigushimisha n’ibikubabaza. Bityo bizagufasha kwita ku marangamutima yawe ndetse unazirikane uko icyumweru cyawe cyagenze.

english: Remember: A diary is a way to evaluate your life and make changes.
Did you have a lot of work today? Did you know that taking a break between work and doing breathing exercises can prevent you from getting tired quickly?
kinyarwanda: Uyu munsi wagize akazi kenshi? Ese wari uzi ko gufata akanya hagati mu kazi ugakora umwitozo wo guhumeka bikurinda kuruha vuba?

english: You can take regular breaks of a few minutes. Stretch your arms, take a moment to do a breathing exercise, and smile. Doing this on a regular basis can help you stay productive.
kinyarwanda: Ushobora gufata akaruhuko k'iminota mike gahoraho. Ukananura amaboko yawe, ugafata akanya ko gukora umwitozo wo guhumeka igihe kirekire, ukaba wanaseka. Gukora ibi mu gihe gihoraho byagufasha gukomeza gukora neza.

english: Try to ignore all frustrations of the workplace. If you get home, relax and do what makes you happier; Such as praying, singing, listening to the radio, visiting farm activities, watering flowers, cooking, playing with children,…
kinyarwanda: Gerageza kwirengagiza ibikunaniza byo mu kazi aho ukorera. Niba ugeze mu rugo ruhuka ukore ibigushimisha bikuruhura kurusha ibindi. Nko gusenga, kuririmba, kumva radiyo, gusura ibikorwa mu murima, kuhira indabo, guteka, gukina n'abana,...

english: Research has shown that creative activities can also help you improve your work.
kinyarwanda: Ubushakashatsi bwagaragaje ko ibikorwa wihangiye (creative activities) bishobora no kugufasha kunoza akazi kawe.

english: Remember: A little progress each day can add up to big results.
Did you know that just paying attention to one thing you are doing can make you feel calmer? This is called mindfulness.
kinyarwanda: Wari uzi ko gutekereza ku kintu kimwe gusa uri gukora bishobora gutuma wumva utuje? Nibyo bita mindfulness.

english: Practice removing stressful thoughts from your mind, that will help you feel calmer. You can try this mindfulness activity while doing various daily activities such as eating, washing your hands, brushing your teeth, etc.
kinyarwanda: Itoze gukura ibitekerezo bikunaniza mu ntekerezo zawe, maze bigufashe kumva utuje. Ushobora kugerageza uyu mwitozo wa mindfulness mu gihe uri gukora ibintu bitandukanye bya buri munsi nko kurya, gukaraba intoki, koza amenyo, n'ibindi.

english: This mindfulness practice can be difficult for you when you are not used to it. Try doing it starting from today.
kinyarwanda: Uyu mwitozo wa mindfulness, ushobora kugukomerera mu gihe utarawumenyera. Gerageza kuwukora uhereye uyu munsi.

english: Remember: Mindfulness can be hard to do until we practice it. Give it a try today.
Try a mindfulness activity: washing your hands. Think of water splashing on your skin, feel the softness of soap, and pay attention as you wash it.
kinyarwanda: Gerageza umwitozo wa mindfulness ukaraba intoki. Tekereza ku mazi ari kugwa ku kuruhu rwawe, wumve ubworohere bw'isabune mu gihe ukaraba, hanyuma urebe uruhu rwawe mu gihe urwoza.

english: Look at how clean you skin is while you dry it. There is nothing more important in those few seconds than washing your hands.
kinyarwanda: Reba uburyo uruhu rwawe rufite isuku mu gihe uri kurwumutsa. Muri ayo masegonda make ntakindi kintu cy' ingenzi uretse gukara intoki.

english: Remember: Calmness is your weapon against challenges.
We breathe all the time. But when we have problems, it makes it hard to breath. Deep breathing exercises can help you relax.
kinyarwanda: Duhumeka igihe cyose. Ariko iyo turi mubibazo duhumeka bitugoye. Umwitozo wo guhumeka cyane ushobora kugufasha kuruhuka.

english: Just focus on how the breathing exercise is making your whole body feel.
kinyarwanda: Tekereza gusa ukuntu umwitozo wo guhumeka uri gutuma wiyumva mu mubiri wose.

english: Remember: Breathe deep to release negative energy.
Try to inhale through your nose for 4 seconds, this will make your stomach rise.
kinyarwanda: Gerageza winjize umwuka ukoresheje amazuru yawe mu masegonda 4, urumva igifu cyawe kizamuka.

english: Exhale through your mouth for 4 seconds.
kinyarwanda: Sohora umwuka ukoresheje umunwa wawe amasegonda 4.

english: Are you feeling scared? Try this \"breathing exercise\".
kinyarwanda: Urumva ufite ubwoba? Gerageza \"umwitozo wo guhumeka\".

english: Say to yourself: when you breathe in \"2, 3, 4\", when you hold your breath \"2, 3, 4\", when you breathe out \"2, 3, 4\". Once you do this you will feel calm.
kinyarwanda: Ibwire ubwawe: igihe winjije umwuka 2 3 4, igihe uhagaritse umwuka \"2, 3, 4\", igihe usohoye umwuka \"2, 3, 4\". Numara kubikora uzumva utuje.

english: Practice doing it now so you know what to do the next time you feel scared.
kinyarwanda: Itoze kubikora ubu kugira ngo umenye icyo gukora ubutaha wumvise ufite ubwoba.

english: Remember: Hope is the only thing stronger than fear.

kinyarwanda: Injiza umwuka hanyuma ubare kugeza kuri 4,

english: Hold your breath for a count of 4,
Then breath out for a count of 4.
kinyarwanda: Hanyuma sohora umwuka ubara kugeza kuri 4.

english: Angry? Upset? Rushing to get things done? Calm yourself with a few deep, slow breaths. Breath in through your nose and then out through your mouth. Make it a long slow out breath. It’s good to feel calmer.
kinyarwanda: Ese urarakaye? Urababaye? Ese uri kwihutisha ibintu ngo birangire? Tuza, ukore umwitozo wo guhumeka. Injiza umwuka ukoresheje amazuru, hanyuma uwusohore ukoresheje umunwa. Bikore igihe kirekire. Biragufasha kumva utuje.

english: Remember: Be kind, even on your bad days.
kinyarwanda: Iminsi irasa ariko ntihwana, kandi buri munsi ugira ibyiza byawo

english: How are you doing with practicing mindfulness? Try to take it a step further by taking some time every day (maybe at home, before you go to sleep) to just be aware of every part of your body, your breathing, and your thoughts.
kinyarwanda: Ese urumva umerewe ute nyuma yo gukora imyitozo ya mindfulness? Gerageza gutera indi ntambwe ufata umwanya buri munsi. Menya ibice bigize umubiri wawe, umenye uko guhumeka kwawe kumeze, cyangwa se uko ibitekerezo byawe bimeze uri mu rugo.

english: Remember: Start each day thinking about the things you are grateful for.

Research has shown that being more aware of sensations and feelings can enhance our well-being. Take a moment away from your work and focus on your body. Listen to your breathing. Feel the sensation of the air on your lips. Notice the movement in your chest. That is being mindful. You can do it any time: wash your hands mindfully, even walk mindfully.
kinyarwanda: Ubushakashatsi bwagaragaje ko kumenya neza ibyiyumvo n'amarangamutima bishobora kuzamura imibereho myiza yacu. Shakisha akanya gato mu kazi kawe ukore umwitozo wa mindfulness wibanda ku mubiri wawe. Umva uburyo uhumeka, uko wiyumva iyo umuyaga uguhushye ku munwa, reba uko bigenda mu gituza cyawe iyo uhumeka. Ushobora kubikora igihe icyo aricyo cyose; karaba intoki ubitekerezaho, hanyuma genda unabitekerezaho.

english: Remember: Experience the here and now and feel refreshed.
Take time to relax. It can help you recover your strength and feel refreshed. Here’s how:
kinyarwanda: Fata umwanya w'akaruhuko. Bishobora kugufasha kukongerera imbaraga no kumva uruhutse. Ubu nibwo buryo bwagufasha:

english: Remember: If you are tired, learn to rest, not quit.
Do things mindfully: focus fully as you wash your hands or eat your food.
kinyarwanda: Kora ibintu ubitekerezaho (mindfully): Ibande cyane ku gutekereza mu gihe uri gukaraba intoki cyangwa uri kurya.

english: Take a few deep breaths at regular intervals to help you relax.
kinyarwanda: 2- Fata akanya ko guhumeka buhoro buhoro kugira ngo ubashe kuruhuka.

english: Have you been able to practice mindfulness? Why don’t you and your co-workers spend some time practicing mindfulness together? Take a few minutes each day to pay attention to your body or what is going on around you. Just a few minutes of cutting off from the busy world will help.
kinyarwanda: Ese wabashije gukora umwitozo wa mindfulness? Ese wowe n'abakozi mukorana ntimwamara umwanya muri gukora umwitozo wa mindfulness? Gerageza gufata iminota mike buri munsi wite ku mubiri wawe cyangwa wite ku ibintu bikuri iruhande. Iminota mike uba ufashe hagati mukazi yo kwirengagiza ibindi izagufasha.

english: Remember: You are the sky. Everything else is just weather.
Support from people around you is important. It will help you know how to behave in your daily life and be healthy.
kinyarwanda: Ubufasha buturutse ku bantu bakuba hafi aba ari ingenzi. Bwagufasha kumenya uko witwara mu buzima bwawe bwa buri munsi no kugira ubuzima bwiza.

english: Try to get along well with your friends and family. Find time to connect with them and hang out with them after work.
kinyarwanda: Gerageza kubana neza n'inshuti n'umuryango wawe. Shakisha umwanya wo gusabana/ kwishimana nabo nyuma y'akazi.

english: Remember: Every day may not be good, but there will be something good in every day.
It is possible that it is been a while since you talked to someone important to you. If there is one, think of a special moment you shared together.
kinyarwanda: Birashoboka ko haba hashize igihe kinini hari umuntu w'ingenzi mudaheruka kuvugana. Niba ahari, tekereza ibihe bidasanzwe mwagiranye.

english: Calling, sending a short message, or visiting will let them know you have been thinking about them. It will make you feel better too.
kinyarwanda: Kumuhamagara, kumwoherereza ubutumwa bugufi, cyangwa kumusura bizatuma amenya ko umaze igihe umuzirikana. Nawe bizatuma wumva umerewe neza.

english: Remember: Life always offers you a second chance. It is called tomorrow.
Everyone experiences good and bad times. If you are not feeling well, feeling unhappy or finding difficult to overcome and cope with problems, you may need someone to help you.
kinyarwanda: Buri muntu ahura n'ibihe ibyiza n'ibibi. Niba utameze neza nkuko bisanzwe, utishimye, ubona hari ibikugoye guhangana nabyo, ushobora kuba ukeneye umuntu wagufasha.

english: Try to find someone who can help you early, so that you feel good. Talk to a professional counsellor, your doctor or someone you trust. It is normal to feel uncomfortable in life, there is no problem in asking for help.
kinyarwanda: Gerageza gushaka umuntu wagufasha hakiri kare, kugira ngo wumve umerewe neza. Ganiriza umujyanama wabigize umwuga, umuganga wawe cyangwa undi muntu wizeye. Mu buzima birasanzwe kumva utameze neza, ntacyo bitwaye gusaba ubufasha.

english: Remember: It’s OK to not be OK. And it’s OK to ask for help.
kinyarwanda: Umutwe umwe ntiwigira inama, wifasha gusara.

english: Did you have a lot of work today? Find time to connect with people you work with because their support is valuable.
kinyarwanda: Uyu munsi wagize akazi kenshi? Shakisha umwanya wo gusabana nabo mukorana kuko ubufasha bwabo ari ingirakamaro.

english: The regular work meetings keep everyone informed. But to meet with others regularly can be helpful too. If you work remotely (in the field or at the health post) talk to your co-worker on the phone when you can.
kinyarwanda: Inama z'akazi zisanzwe zituma buri wese agezwaho amakuru. Ariko guhura bisanzwe n'abandi bishobora kugufasha nabyo. Niba ukorera kure (kuri terrain na health post (Ikigo ntanga buzima)) ganira n'umukozi mukorana kuri terefone mu gihe ubishoboye.

english: Remember: Helping others is a way to help yourself.

In everyday work everyone needs help, in case you are not feeling well or you feel despair. Who do you think can help you? Perhaps it is your friend or your leader (boss). Sometimes, you may need support from a professional counselor.
kinyarwanda: Mukazi ka buri munsi umuntu wese akenera ubufasha, mu gihe atameze neza cyangwa yihebye. Urumva ari inde wizeye wagufasha? Ahari yaba ari inshuti yawe cyangwa umuyobozi wawe. Rimwe na rimwe, ushobora gukenera ubufasha buturutse k'umujyanama wabigize umwuga. Gerageza gutekereza kuwa gufasha kuruhuka.

english: Try to think of those who can help you relax.
kinyarwanda: Umutwe umwe wifasha gusara ntiwifasha gutekereza.

english: Healthcare workers can be confronted with a demanding task, especially in times of war and pandemics. If you feel tired, overwhelmed with problems all the time, reach out to a professional counselor. They are trained to help and keep it confidential.
kinyarwanda: Abakozi batanga serivisi z'ubuvuzi bashobora kugira akazi kataboroheye cyane cyane mu bihe by'intambara n'ibyorezo. Niba wumva unaniwe, ukumva uremerewe n'ibibazo buri gihe, gana umujyanama wabigize umwuga. Baba baratojwe gutanga ubufasha no kubika ibanga.

english: Research has shown that sharing your feelings with others can help you build ability to cope with extreme fatigue and stress. Everyone needs these things.
kinyarwanda: Ubushakashatsi bwagaragaje ko gusangiza abandi uko wiyumva bigufasha kwiyubakamo ubushobozi bwo guhangana n'umunaniro ukabije. Ibi bintu buri wese arabikeneye.

english: Remember: Everyone falls down. Getting up is how you learn to walk.

Feeling sad and low? Talk to a counselor. They can help you find the tools to feel better. They will also make sure whatever you say is between you and them. If you can’t get to a counselor, talk to someone you can trust like an older relative, a friend, or a religious leader. Make an appointment so you can feel better quicker.
kinyarwanda: Ese urumva ubabaye kandi ucitse intege? Gana umujyanama wabigize umwuga. Yagufasha kumva umerewe neza. Ikindi azi neza ko ibyo uvuga byose bisigara hagati yanyu. Niba utabashije kubona umujyanama w'umunyamwuga, gana umuntu wizeye nk'umuntu mukuru wo mu muryango wawe, inshuti, cyangwa umubwirizabutumwa. Tegura gahunda yo kwegera umwe muri abo uzagufasha kumva umerewe neza.

english: Remember: The best time to be happy is now!
kinyarwanda: Utaganiriye na se ntamenya icyo sekuru yasize avuze.

english: What are the things you worry about most? Share your list of worries with a co-worker. You may find you have worries in common. You can share your solutions as well.
kinyarwanda: Haba hari bintu bigutera impungenge/biguhangayikishije cyane? Sangiza uwo mukorana wizeye izo mpungenge. Ushobora gusanga muzisangiye. Mushobora no gusangira uko zacyemuka.

english: Remember: A problem shared is a problem halved.
kinyarwanda: Ahari abagabo ntihapfa abandi. Kandi Ujya gukira indwara arayirata

english: Ever been so busy you have no time for yourself? We all do this sometimes, but it makes it harder to deal with the pressures of life. Connecting with friends and family can help you feel happier. Plan to connect with an old friend, someone who is special to you. Find time each week to connect.
kinyarwanda: Ese ujya ugira akazi kenshi gatuma wiburira umwanya? Twese bitubaho bigatuma guhangana n'ibibazo by'ubuzima bitugora. Gusabana n'inshuti n'umuryango bishobora kugufasha kumva unezerewe. Geregeza utegure kujya uhura n'inshuti mudaherukana cyangwa se umuntu w'agaciro kuri wowe. Shakisha umwanya uhagije kugira ngo muganire.

english: Remember: The only way to have a friend is to be one.

Healthy relationships can help you recover from challenging situations. Open communication with people around you can help strengthen your relationships. If you are stressed about your workload or feel your work is going unappreciated, talk to your supervisor. Together you can look for solutions to help you work and feel better.
kinyarwanda: Umubano mwiza ushobora kugufasha kuva mu bihe bigoranye. Kugirana ikiganiro kirambuye n'abantu mubana/mukorana bishobora kugufasha gukomeza umubano nabo. Niba uhangayikishijwe n'ingano y’akazi ufite cyangwa se ukumva akazi kawe kadashimwa, vugana n'umuyobozi wawe. Hamwe na we mushobora gushakisha ibisubizo bigufasha gukora akazi no kumva umerewe neza.

english: Remember: Good words are worth much and cost little.
You can learn a lot from the people you work with. Share your joys and pains with your co-workers. It will help you understand each other. You can also offer each other help and advice.
kinyarwanda: Ushobora kwigira byinshi ku bantu mukorana. Sangiza abo mukorana ibi kunezeza n'ibikubabaza. Bizabafasha kumvikana hagati yanyu, gufashanya no kungurana inama.

english: Next time you spend some time with a co-worker, try to share one thing about yourself that they don’t already know. Invite them to do the same.
kinyarwanda: Ubutaha numarana igihe n'umukozi mukorana, gerageza kumusangiza ikintu kimwe atazi kuri wowe. Musabe nawe kuba yagusangiza ibye.

english: Remember: Count your blessings, but also make your blessings count.

Spending time with co-workers can help you build a good relationship with them. Find time in your busy schedule to take part in activities with your co-workers. You could eat together, travel together to and from work, do breathing exercises together, or do something that is not work related, so you can all relax together.
kinyarwanda: Kumarana umwanya n'abakozi mukorana byagufasha kugirana umubano mwiza nabo. Shakisha umwanya hagati mu kazi ugire ibikorwa mukorera hamwe. Mushobora gusangira ifunguro, gutemberana, kugendana muva cyangwa mujya ku kazi, gukora imyitozo yo guhumeka, gukora ikindi kintu kitajyanye n'akazi mukora, cyangwa kuruhukira hamwe.

english: Remember: Make your co-workers your work family.

If you are worrying more than usual, find it hard to enjoy life, have thoughts and feelings that are difficult to cope with, you need to seek help. Talk to a counselor, doctor, or even just someone you trust. They can help you figure out what is troubling you and what you can do to feel better.
kinyarwanda: Niba uhangayitse cyane kurusha ibihe bisanzwe, bikugora kwishimira ubuzima, ufite intekerezo n'amarangamutima akugoye, ukeneye ubufasha. Ganiriza umujyanama wabigize umwuga, umuganga, cyangwa umuntu wizeye. Bashobora kugufasha kumenya ikikubangamiye nicyo wakora kugira ngo wumve umerewe neza.

english: Remember: Today is another chance to do better.

When there’s so much to do, it can be hard to give people your full attention. Being a good listener can help to build trust and create strong relationships. Next time someone wants to talk, stop doing other things. Listen carefully. Repeat what you have heard so they know you have understood.
kinyarwanda: Iyo hari ibintu byinshi byo gukora, bishobora kukugora guha abantu umwanya uhagije. Gutega amatwi abandi bishobora kugufasha kubaka icyizere no kugirana nabo umubano mwiza. Ubutaha mu gihe hari umuntu ushaka kukuganiriza, uzahagarike gukora ibyo uzaba urimo. Uzamutege amatwi. Uzasubiremo ibyo yavuze kugira ngo abone ko wamwumvise.

english: Remember: Listening is often the only thing needed to help someone.

People feeling stressed and anxious may need help. Is a co-worker struggling? Offer them a chance to talk. Talking to a friend may help them feel better. If they are tired all the time, constantly feeling worried, or not sleeping well, suggest that they seek professional help from a doctor or a counselor.
kinyarwanda: Abantu bumva bafite umunaniro ukabije kandi barushye baba bakeneye ubufasha. Ese n'umukozi mukorana uhangayitse? Muhe umwanya muganire. Kuba yaganiriza umuntu byamufasha kumererwa neza. Niba aba arushye buri gihe, ahora afite impungenge, cyangwa adasinzira neza, mugire inama yo gushaka ubufasha buvuye ku muganga cyangwa umujyanama wabigize umwuga.

english: Remember: We have two hands: one for helping ourselves and one for helping others.

Support from your co-workers can help you cope with work pressures. Plan regular informal meetings with your co-workers. Use the meetings to discuss a particular issue that you feel is affecting your ability to do your job well. Ask others to share as well. Together you can find solutions.
kinyarwanda: Ubufasha buturutse ku mukozi mukorana bushobora kugufasha guhangana n'igitutu cy'akazi. Tegura inama hamwe n'abakozi mukorana. Muri iyo nama ba ariho muganirira ikibazo runaka wumva kiri gutuma udakora akazi kawe neza. Saba abandi nabo batange ibitekerezo byabo. Mwese hamwe mushobora kubishakira ibisubizo.

english: Remember: Learn to listen. Opportunity sometimes knocks very softly.

Did you feel good when you connected with your friend? Talking with a trusted friend helps. It can make you feel listened to and supported. Telling someone about your work may make you realize just how much you do and how important it is. Plan to connect with friends often and support each other.
kinyarwanda: Ese wigeze wumva umerewe neza igihe wongeye guhura n'inshuti yawe? Kuganira n'inshuti wizeye bigufasha kumva ko witahweho kandi ushyigikiwe. Kuganiriza umuntu akazi ukora bikwereka agaciro kako. Teganya guhura n'inshuti kenshi kandi munafashanye.

english: Remember: You can be a rainbow in someone’s cloud.
kinyarwanda: Incuti iruta incuro.\n Ababiri baruta umwe

english: Sharing food is a way for your team to be together. Every month, each person could bring food to share at a meal. You could also collect money from everyone to provide healthy snacks in your workplace. You can help everyone stay healthy and motivated.
kinyarwanda: Gusangira hamwe amafunguro kenshi ni bumwe mu buryo bwiza bwo kubaka urugwiro mu bantu bakorana. Urugero: gukusanya amafaranga mwajya mugura amafunguro mato mu kazi, kuzana ibyo kurya,... Bityo bizafasha umuntu kugira ubuzima bwiza n’ubushake bwo gukora.

english: Remember: Food brings people together. It nourishes the body and soul.
Did you know that taking care of yourself can help reduce extreme fatigue and stress and make you happy? It allows you to deliver better healthcare services to your clients.
kinyarwanda: Ese wari uzi ko kwiyitaho byagufasha kugabanya umunaniro ukabije bigatuma wishima? Bituma urushaho gutanga serivisi nziza z'ubuvuzi uha abakugana.

english: These are some ways to help you take care of yourself:
kinyarwanda: Ubu ni bumwe mu buryo bwagufasha kwiyitaho:

english: It is good when an individual tries to do this every day.
kinyarwanda: Nibyiza, iyo umuntu agerageje kubikora buri munsi.

english: Remember: The challenge is not to be perfect - it is to be whole.

Having enough sleep is important, but when you work overtime or shift, it can be difficult for you to sleep well. Create your own relaxation routine before going to bed such as praying, a few minutes of breathing exercices, thinking about people who bring you joy,...
kinyarwanda: Gusinzira neza kandi bihagije ni ngombwa. Ariko mu gihe ukora amasaha y'ikirenga cyangwa ukora usimburwa (shift) bishobora kukugora gusinzira neza. Shyiraho gahunda yawe bwite yo kwisanzura mbere yo kuryama nko kuvuga isengesho, iminota mike yo gukora umwitozo wo guhumeka, gutekereza ku bantu bakuzanira umunezero,...

english: Try to do this every day so that your body get used to your bed time.
kinyarwanda: Gerageza kubikora buri munsi kugira ngo umubiri wawe umenye igihe cyo gusinzira.

english: Remember: A well-spent day brings happy sleep.
Good nutrition is important for you and people you care about. What you eat and drink can effect your feelings, your ability to think, and how you cope with extreme fatigue and stress.
kinyarwanda: Imirire myiza ni ingirakamaro kuri wowe no ku bantu witaho. Ibyo urya n'ibyo unywa bishobora kugira ingaruka ku byiyumviro byawe, kubushobozi bwawe bwo gutekereza, no kuburyo urwanya umunaniro ukabije.

english: If you are tired and find it hard to pay attention to what you are doing these days, it would be better if you take a meal before leaving or take snacks to work with you.
kinyarwanda: Niba unaniwe ukabona bikugoye kwita kubyo ukora muri iyi minsi. Byaba byiza ufashe amafunguro mbere yo kuva mu rugo cyangwa ukitwaza amafunguro mato ugiye mu kazi.
Gahunda iyo zibaye nyinshi uhera kuyo kurya.

english: When you are very busy, you may not have time to eat. If you don’t eat for a long time, you can get a headache or feel tired and irritable. If you reach for a sugary drink or sweet food, it can make you feel worse. Try to take some healthy snacks with you when you’re working. Pack some nuts or a piece of fruit. Wash your hands before eating.
kinyarwanda: Iyo ufite akazi kenshi, ushobora kutabona umwanya wo kurya. Iyo utabashije kurya mu gihe nyacyo, ushobora kurwara umutwe, ukumva urushye cyangwa urakaye. Uramutse ufashe ikintu kiryohereye muri ako kanya gishobora gutuma ukomeza kumererwa nabi. Mu gihe uri gukora, gerageza gufata amafunguro mato. Gendana ubunyobwa cyangwa imbuto. Wibuke gukaraba intoki mbere yuko urya.

english: Remember: You are what you eat, so eat well.

If you struggle to sleep well, you're not alone. Studies have shown that workers who do long hours and shift work find it difficult to sleep properly. But it is not impossible. Simple lifestyle changes can help:
kinyarwanda: Niba bijya bikugora kubona ibitotsi, ntabwo uri wenyine. Ubushakashatsi bwagaragaje ko abakozi bakora amasaha y'ikirenga n'abakora basimburanwa (shifts) bagorwa no gusinzira neza. Ariko birashoboka. Impinduka mu buzima zagufasha:

english: Remember: Tired minds don’t work well.
Have a warm shower or listen to quiet music before you go to bed.
kinyarwanda: Gukaraba amazi ashyushye cyangwa kumva indirimbo/umuziki utuje mbere yo kujya kuryama.

english: Make sure the room is dark.
Avoid heavy meals right before you sleep.
kinyarwanda: Irinde amafunguro aremereye mbere yo kujya kuryama.

english: Sleep matters. While you sleep, your heart rate slows and you recover from your day’s work. Here are 3 ways to get good sleep:
kinyarwanda: Gusinzira ni ingenzi. Mu gihe usinziriye, ugutera k'umutima wawe kugenda gake hanyuma ninako ugenda uruhuka kubera akazi uba wiriwemo. Dore uburyo butatu bushobora kugufasha kuba wasinzira neza:

english: Remember: End your day by thinking about the good things that have happened.
Check your work schedule so you can plan some early-to-bed days.
kinyarwanda: Reba kuri gahunda y'akazi kawe kugira ngo ube wategura iminsi yo kuryama hakiri kare.

english: Turn off your phone if you can.
Reduce the lighting in your room.
Shift work can upset your sleep pattern and make you feel low. Try these 3 tips to help you feel better:
kinyarwanda: Akazi gasimburwa (shift) gashobora kubangamira uburyo usinzira ibyo bikagutera kumva udatuje. Gerageza izi nama zizagufasha kumva umerewe neza:

english: Remember: A nap means you get two mornings in a day!
Take a daytime nap before your first night shift
kinyarwanda: Sinzira ku manywa niba uri bukore ijoro

english: Have your main meal before you start work
kinyarwanda: Fata ifunguro ry'ibanze mbere yuko utangira akazi

english: Keep the lights on during night shifts
kinyarwanda: Mu gihe uri gukora ijoro, cana amatara

english: Want to improve your life physically and emotionally? Bring nature into your everyday life. Try these tips:
kinyarwanda: Urashaka kuzamura imibereho yawe y'umubiri niy'amarangamutima? Ubaka ubusabane n’ibidukikije mu buzima bwawe bwa buri munsi. Gerageza izi nama:

english: Remember: You plant a tree so your grandchildren will have shade.
Have a family picnic in a park.
kinyarwanda: Jyana n'umuryango wawe gutembera uhereye ahantu hakwegereye hari umwuka mwiza.

english: Go for a leisurely stroll each day.
kinyarwanda: Kora urugendo n’amaguru  buri munsi unanura amaguru.

english: Try gardening. Growing herbs in a pot can be very rewarding. Try it!
kinyarwanda: Gerageza gukora umurima w’imboga n'indabo. Kubihinga bizagushimisha!

english: Don’t forget to look after yourself. When you are well, you can do your job better and respond to work pressures better. Eat well, sleep well, take breaks, do things that you enjoy. These are all ways to care for yourself. Share your self-care ideas with co-workers.
kinyarwanda: Ntiwibagirwe kwiyitaho. Iyo umeze neza ukora akazi neza. Rya neza, usinzire neza, fata uturuhuko duto, kora ibintu ukunda gukora. Ubu bwose ni uburyo bwo kwiyitaho. Sangiza abo mukorana ibitekerezo by'uko wiyitaho.

english: Remember: Be kinder to yourself. And then your kindness can flow out into the world.

You care for your patients but who cares for you? Self-care is not selfish. It means you have more energy to care for people and you will enjoy your job more. You and your co-workers can help each other. Look after each other. Make eating well and taking lots of very short breaks normal for your team.
kinyarwanda: Inshingano zawe ni ukwita ku barwayi, ariko se wowe ni inde ukwitaho? Kwiyitaho ntabwo ari ukwikunda. Ahubwo bivuze ko ufite imbaraga zo kwita ku bantu kandi wishimira akazi kawe cyane. Wowe n'abo mukorana mushobora gufashanya, urugero: gufata ifunguro ryuzuye n’ibiruhuko bigufi hagati nk'itsinda ryanyu.

english: Remember: You cannot pour from an empty cup. Take care of yourself first.
You have completed the first month of this journey. Now you have understood what stress is, what causes it, and know how you can control your feelings.
kinyarwanda: Urangije ukwezi kwa mbere muri uru rugendo. Ubu noneho wamaze gusobanukirwa umunaniro ukabije icyo ari cyo, ikiwutera, unamenya uko ushobora kugenzura uko wiyumva.
Hari icyo wamenye kuri ibi bikurikira:

english: Think about how you felt when you tried these activities. Don't forget to write in your notebook.
kinyarwanda: Tekereza uko wumvaga umeze igihe wageragezaga ibi bikorwa. Ntiwibagirwe kwandika mu ikaye yawe.

english: How to pay attention to one thing you are doing (Mindfulness)
kinyarwanda: Uburyo bwo gutekereza ku kintu kimwe uri gukora (Mindfulness)

english: How friends and family can help you feel better.
kinyarwanda: Uburyo inshuti n'umuryango bashobora kugufasha kumererwa neza.

english: You have completed the second month of this program. Now, we hope you are feeling better.
kinyarwanda: Urangije ukwezi kwa kabiri muri iyi gahunda. Ubu turizera ko uri kurushaho kugenda umererwa neza.

english: This month we learned the following things:
kinyarwanda: Muri uku kwezi twize uburyo bukurikira:

english: Have you ever tried any of these? Write in your notebook what helped you and what did not. Try to do it through the next month.
kinyarwanda: Ese wigeze ugerageza kimwe muri ibi? Andika mu ikayi yawe ibyagufashije n'ibitaragufashije. Komeza ubigerageze kugeza ukwezi gutaha.

english: Take a break in the middle of work
Get help when you need it
This month you learned that setting small goals and achieving them is rewarding. You may have:
kinyarwanda: Uku kwezi wize ko kugira intego nto no kuzigeraho bitera ishema. Ushobora:

english: Write in your notebook about how you feel. Plan to use these new skills in the next month as well.
kinyarwanda: Andika mu ikayi yawe uko wiyumva. Teganya gukoresha ubu bumenyi mu kwezi gutaha.

english: Connected with your friends and family more.
kinyarwanda: Kuba waratangiye gusabana n'inshuti n'umuryango wawe inshuro nyinshi.

english: Learned why and when to seek professional help.
kinyarwanda: Waramenye impamvu n'igihe ukeneye gushaka ubufasha ku nyamwuga.

english: We hope you have learned to:
Write down in your notebook what the most important things have been for you.
kinyarwanda: Andika mu ikayi yawe ibintu by'ingenzi byakugendekeye neza.

english: Make mindfulness and self-care a regular part of your life.
kinyarwanda: Mindfulenss ndetse no kwiyitaho ni bimwe mu bigize ubuzima bwawe.

english: Practice gratitude and be kinder to yourself.
PBe honest and open with others.
Connect with your friends and family regularly.
kinyarwanda: Sabana n'inshuti n'umuryango ku buryo buhoraho.

english: It’s been 5 months since you began your resilience journey. Well done! You have made real progress.
kinyarwanda: Hashize amezi atanu utangiye uru rugendo rwo kumererwa neza (resilience). Wakoze neza! Wabashije kugira icyo ukuramo.

english: Use your notebook to reflect on how you have changed during this course and what your goals are for next month.
kinyarwanda: Koresha ikaye yawe urebe uburyo wahindutse mu gihe kiri somo n'intego zawe z'ukwezi gutaha.

english: Think in a more balanced way.
Listen to others with more empathy.
Share with others what you have learned.
You are ready to enter the last month of your resilience journey. We hope you have been able to look after yourself and spent some time in nature.
kinyarwanda: Ubu uritegura kwinjira mu kwezi kwa nyuma k'uru rugendo. Twizeyeko washoboye kwiyitaho kandi ukamara akanya ahantu hatuje.

english: This has been a month of deep thinking:
kinyarwanda: Uku kwabaye ukwezi ko gutekereza cyane:

english: Write tips for yourself in your notebook on what worked well and what you will continue to do after the course finishes.
kinyarwanda: Andika ibyemezo/ingamba mu ikaye yawe ku byaba byaragenze neza nibyo uzakomeza gukora nyuma iri somo rirangiye.

english: You have reached the end of your 6-month resilience journey. At the end of this journey, we hope you have learned to recognize what causes you stress. You have found coping strategies that work for you. Perhaps you have been able to share your learnings with people around you. We hope you have enjoyed this journey and that you will continue practicing what you have learned.
kinyarwanda: Ugeze ku musozo w'ukwezi kwa gatandatu muri gahunda yuko warushaho kumererwa neza (Kwiyitaho, kuruhuka,...).  Nyuma y'iyi gahunda, twizera ko wize ukamenya igitera umunaniro ukabije. Wabashije kumenya uburyo/ingamba bushobora kugufasha gahangana nawo. Biranashoboka ko wabashije gusangiza ibyo wize abantu mubana mu buzima bwa buri munsi. Twizera ko wishimiye uru rugendo kandi uzakomeza ugashyira mu bikorwa ibyo wize.

english: What is your highest level of schooling
Would you like to read your messages now?
114 recommended to send patient to the nearest health center
kinyarwanda: Ku 114 Bangiriye inama yo kohereza umurwayi ku kigo nderabuzima kinyegereye
kirundi: Ku 114 bemeje kurungika umurwayi mu Kigo c'amagara y'abantu kiri/ca hafi cane

english: 114 recommended to send patient to Rapid Response Team center
kinyarwanda: Ku 114 Bangiriye inama yo kohereza umurwayi ku itsinda rishinzwe gutanga ubuvuzi bwihuse
kirundi: Kuri 114 bemeje kurungika umurwayi mu kigo c'Umugwi w'Inyishu Yihuta

english: 114 recommended to send patient to the nearest hospital
kinyarwanda: Ku 114 bangiriye inama yo kohereza umurwayi ku bitaro binyegereye
kirundi: Ku 114 bemeje kurungika umurwayi ku bitaro biri/vya hafi cane

english: 114 did not recommended to send patient to site
kirundi: Ku 114 ntibemeje kurungika umurwayi ku kibanza c'iyakiriro

english: Not able to talk to 114 - no answer
somali: Ma awoodo inuu la hadlo 114 - lama qabanayo

english: Not able to talk to 114 - busy signal
somali: Ma awoodo inuu la hadlo 114 - waa mashquul

english: Not able to talk to 114 - other reason
somali: Ma awoodo inuu la hadlo 114 - sabab kale

english: Site recommendation: Team will come to village
kinyarwanda: Imyanzuro y’urwego rubishinzwe: Itsinda rizaza mu mudugudu
kirundi: Icifuzo c'urubuga: umurwi uzoza mu kw'ikgwati/ku musozi
somali: Talooyinka goobta: Kooxdu waxay iman doonaan tuulada/xaafada

english: Site recommendation: Send patient to site with referral form
kinyarwanda: Imyanzuro y’urwego rubishinzwe: Twohereze umurwayi yitwaje impapuro zimwohereza
kirundi: Icifuzo c'urubuga: rungika umurwayi ku kigo afise urupapuro/ifishi y'irungikwa
somali: Talooyinka goobta: Bukaanka u dir goobta oo raaci foomka gudbinta

english: Not able to talk to site due - no response. Sent patient with referral form
kinyarwanda: Ntibyakunze kuvugana n’urwego rubishinzwe kubera- nta gisubizo cyabonetse. Nohereje umurwayi yitwaje impapuro zimwohereza
kirundi: Ntivyakunze kuvuganira k'urubuga/mu kigo kubera - nta nyishu. Rungika umurwayi wamuhaye n'urupapuro/Ifishi rumurungika ahandi
somali: Ma awoodo inuu la hadlo goobta sababtuna - Jawaab la`aan. Bukaanka waxaa lala diray foomka gudbinta

english: Did not talk to site as patient has refused
kinyarwanda: Ntibyakunze kuvugana n’urwego rubishinzwe kubera umurwayi yanze
kirundi: Ntiyashoboye kuvuga ashitse mu kigo/ku kibanza kuko umurwayi yanse
somali: Cidna lama hadlin oo bukaanka ayaa diiday

english: Not able to talk to site - other reason
kinyarwanda: Ntibyakunze kuvugana n’urwego rubishinzwe- Izindi mpamvu
kirundi: Ntivyakunze kuvuganira k'urubuga/mu kigo - Izindi mpavu
somali: Ma awoodo inuu la hadlo goobta - sabab kale

kinyarwanda: Ongera ukore isuzuma ufatanije n’ukwitabye kuri 114
somali: Dib u eeg xaalad leh 114 jawaab celiye
Dib u eeg Baaritaanka ka hor

kinyarwanda: Abashobora kwibasirwa n'indwara runaka (kubera impamvu zitandukanye:kuba atwite..)

english: How many sachets of supplement is given to the child per day
kinyarwanda: Ni amasashe angahe ahabwa umwana ku munsi
kirundi: Mbega umwana aronka udukarato/udusashe tw'imfungurwa zo kongereza - ivyunyunyu m'umubiri - tungahe k'umunsi

english: Have you saved money for use at the health center while you give birth
kinyarwanda: Wazigamye amafaranga yo gukoresha ku kigo nderabuzima igihe cyo kubyara
kirundi: Mbega warabitse amafaranga yo gukoresha kw'ivuriro/kwa muganga niwibaruka
somali: Ma keydsatay lacag aad u baahan karto marka aad ku dhalaysid xarun caafimaad
Jadwal u samee ka War qabka

english: Search E-Heza to see if the contact already exists
kinyarwanda: Reba muri E-heza niba abo bahuye basanzwe barimo
kirundi: Rondera ucuye muri E-Heza kugira urabe ko izina risanzwe ririmwo
somali: Raadi E-Heza haddii qofka horay u jiray
Raadi ka qeyb galayaasha horay u jiray

english: Search to see if the additional family member already exists in E-Heza. If the person you are looking for does not appear in the search, please create a new record for them.
kinyarwanda: Kanda ku Ishakiro kugirango urebe niba umugenerwabikorwa asanzwe ari muri E-Heza. Niba uwo muntu atagaragara mu ishakiro, mwandike nk'umugenerwabikorwa mushya.
kirundi: Rondera uwundi muntu wo mu muryango ko yoba yaramaze kwinjizwa muri E-Heza. Mu gihe uwo urondera atabonetse, ugurura/tegura iyindi fishe/urupapuro rw'abo.
somali: Raadi hadii xubinta qoyska dheeraadka ah uu horay ugu jiray E-Heza. Haddii qofka aad raadinayso uuna ka asoo muuqan raadinta, fadlan u abuur diiwaan cusub.

kirundi: Raba igipimo c'umuti (Doze) ingene ipanzwe/iteguye hakurikijwe ibiro
somali: Eeg jadwalka dooska adoo u fiirinaya Miisaanka

english: Select all signs that are present
kinyarwanda: Hitamo ibimenyetso by'imirire byose bishoboka umwana afite

kinyarwanda: Hitamo kimwe cg byinshi mu bimenyetso mpuruza umubyeyi yaba afite
kirundi: Hitamwo kimwe canke birenga mu bimenyetso mburizi vyugarije umurwayi
somali: Fadlan dooro hal ama ka badan calaamadaha halista ah ee ka muuqda bukaanka

english: Please select one or more symptoms the patient is experiencing
kinyarwanda: Hitamo kimwe cyangwa byinshi mu bimenyetso umurwayi afite
kirundi: Hitamwo ikimenyetso c'ingwara canke birenga umurwayi ariko arumva
somali: Fadlan dooro hal ama ka badan calaamadaha ka muuqda bukaanka

english: Please select one or more of the danger signs the child is experiencing
kinyarwanda: Hitamo kimwe cg byinshi mu bimenyetso mpuruza umwana  yaba afite?
kirundi: Hitamwo kimwe canke birenga mu bimenyetso mburizi vyugarije umwana
somali: Fadlan dooro hal ama ka badan calaamadaha halista ah ee ka muuqda canuga

english: Please select one or more of the danger signs the mother is experiencing
kinyarwanda: Hitamo kimwe cg byinshi mu bimenyetso mpuruza umubyeyi yaba afite
kirundi: Hitamwo kimwe canke birenga mu bimenyetso mburizi vyugarije umuvyeyi
somali: Fadlan dooro hal ama ka badan calaamadaha halista ah ee ka muuqda hooyada
Dooro Xanuun soo Bood ah leh

english: Select Existing Acute Illness to Record Outcome
kinyarwanda: Hitamo indwara ifatiyeho iheruka kuvurwa kugira ngo wandike iherezo ryayo
kirundi: Hitamwo ingwara ikaze/ikomeye/igoye ihari yo kwinjiza/kwandi inyishu
somali: Dooro Xanuun soo Bood ah leh si aad u diiwaan geliso natiijada

kirundi: Hitamwo ikigwati cawe/umusozi canke umutumba wawe

Ma leedahay tabar yari aad u daran

kirundi: Ufyonze aho kurungika, uba urekuye inyandiko zatowe/zahiswemwo kuri:
somali: Adigoo riixaya ku dir dokumentiga dooran:

somali: Tallaabadan waxay qaadanaysaa hal daqiiqo si loo dhameystiro
